title: Mumia Abu-Jamal: A Case for Reasonable Doubt?
original_title: Mumia Abu-Jamal: A Case for Reasonable Doubt?
overview: Documentary covering the case of Mumia Abu-Jamal, a black nationalist and journalist in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, convicted of killing a Philadelphia police officer and sentenced to death in a trial marked by controversial prosecutorial and defense tactics and charges of racism.

trailers.title: Mumia Abu-Jamal - A Case for Reasonable Doubt?

en.title: Mumia Abu-Jamal - A Case for Reasonable Doubt?
